sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Merck는 2025-06-30 분기에서 Verona Pharma 인수안과 Keytruda 성장, 비용 구조 조정을 함께 보인 분기였다.

keyPoints.text: Merck는 2025년 7월 Verona Pharma plc 인수 계약을 체결해 ADS당 $107, 총거래가 약 $10 billion 조건으로 Ohtuvayre(ensifentrine) 취득을 확정했다.
연구개발 업데이트에서 Keytruda 글로벌 매출은 2분기 9%, 2025년 상반기 7% 성장해 성장 모멘텀을 확인했으며, 미국은 수요와 가격 상승이 동반됐다.
매출 공시의 Lynparza (1) 항목은 370 317 17 % 형태로 제시돼, 제품별 성과 분해가 이루어진다는 점이 드러난다.

riskChanges.text: 미국 Keytruda 매출은 wholesaler 구매 타이밍으로 연초~연도초 약 $200 million negative impact을 받았고, 유통 타이밍 변동이 수요 해석에 리스크 요인으로 남는다.
인수는 ‘Closing’ 과정이 예정되는 단계로 언급되어 있어, 거래 완료 일정과 조건이 확정되기 전까지 실적 반영 시점의 불확실성이 존재한다.

businessChanges.text: Keytruda 성장 동인은 미국에서 urothelial과 endometrial의 전이성 적응증 확대, 그리고 NSCLC, RCC, cervical, high-risk early-stage TNBC 등 초기 단계 적응증 수요 증가로 설명된다.
SG&A는 2분기 3% 감소했으며, 상반기에는 구조조정비 하락과 환율 유리 효과가 행정·프로모션 비용 상승을 상쇄해 2024년 동기와 비슷한 수준을 보였다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출은 158억 600만 달러, 순이익은 44억 2,700만 달러로 2025-06-30 분기의 수익 크기와 수익성 베이스를 보여준다.
총자산은 1,175억 2,300만 달러, 현금및현금성자산은 80억 700만 달러로 분기말 재무 건전성과 유동성 버팀목을 판단할 수 있다.

watchItems.text: 단기적으로는 Keytruda 성장(2분기 9%, 상반기 7%) 뒤에 있는 매출 원천이 얼마나 지속되는지와 함께 Ohtuvayre(ensifentrine) 임상·제휴 자산이 실제 매출로 언제 반영될지 관찰이 필요하다.
연초~연도초의 약 $200 million wholesaler 타이밍 충격이 반복되는지 여부를 계속 점검해야 하며, 반복될 경우 성장률의 순환성 판단이 달라질 수 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-06-30 revenue = 158억 600만 달러 (USD 15.806B; 15,806 million), XBRL range 2025-04-01..2025-06-30.
Quarter ended 2025-06-30 net income = 44억 2,700만 달러 (USD 4.427B; 4,427 million), XBRL range 2025-04-01..2025-06-30.
Quarter ended 2025-06-30 total assets = 1,175억 2,300만 달러 (USD 117.523B; 117,523 million), XBRL range instant..2025-06-30.
Quarter ended 2025-06-30 cash and cash equivalents = 80억 700만 달러 (USD 8.007B; 8,007 million), XBRL range instant..2025-06-30.

Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations Business Development Transactions Below is a summary of significant business development activity thus far in 2025. In July 2025, Merck entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Verona Pharma plc (Verona Pharma), a biopharmaceutical company focused on respiratory diseases, for $107 per American Depository Share (each of which represents eight Verona Pharma ordinary shares) for a total transaction value of approximately $10 billion. Through this acquisition, Merck will acquire Ohtuvayre (ensifentrine), a first-in-class selective dual inhibitor of phosphodiesterases 3 and 4 (PDE3 and PDE4), which was approved in the U.S. in June 2024 for the maintenance treatment of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) in adult patients and is also being evaluated in clinical trials for the treatment of non-c Readable Korean unit: 100억 달러.

Results of Operations Business Development Transactions Below is a summary of significant business development activity thus far in 2025. In July 2025, Merck entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Verona Pharma plc (Verona Pharma), a biopharmaceutical company focused on respiratory diseases, for $107 per American Depository Share (each of which represents eight Verona Pharma ordinary shares) for a total transaction value of approximately $10 billion. Through this acquisition, Merck will acquire Ohtuvayre (ensifentrine), a first-in-class selective dual inhibitor of phosphodiesterases 3 and 4 (PDE3 and PDE4), which was approved in the U.S. in June 2024 for the maintenance treatment of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) in adult patients and is also being evaluated in clinical trials for the treatment of non-cystic fibrosis bronchiectasis. Closing of the acquisition is exp Readable Korean unit: 100억 달러.

Research and Development Update” below. Global sales of Keytruda grew 9% and 7% in the second quarter and first six months of 2025, respectively. Keytruda sales growth in the U.S. in both periods reflects higher demand and pricing. U.S. sales growth in the year-to-date period reflects an approximate $200 million negative impact due to the timing of wholesaler purchases. Demand in the U.S. in both periods was driven by increased utilization across the multiple approved metastatic indications, in particular for the treatment of certain types of urothelial and endometrial cancers, as well as higher demand across earlier-stage indications, including in certain types of non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC), renal cell carcinoma (RCC), cervical cancer, and high-risk early-stage triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC). Keytruda sales growth in international markets reflects higher demand predominate Readable Korean unit: 2억 달러.

General and Administrative Selling, general and administrative (SG&A) expenses declined 3% in the second quarter of 2025 primarily due to lower administrative, restructuring, and promotional costs. SG&A expenses in the first six months of 2025 were comparable with the corresponding period of 2024 as lower restructuring costs and the favorable effect of foreign exchange were largely offset by higher administrative and promotional costs.
